title: Stuttgart Metropolitan Region

infobox.key: [Authority control databases](/wiki/Help:Authority_control "Help:Authority control") [Edit this at Wikidata](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q451619#identifiers "Edit this at Wikidata")

infobox.value: is a [metropolitan region](/wiki/Metropolitan_regions_in_Germany "Metropolitan regions in Germany") in south-west [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany") consisting of the [cities](/wiki/City "City") and regions around [Stuttgart](/wiki/Stuttgart "Stuttgart"), [Heilbronn](/wiki/Heilbronn "Heilbronn"), [Tübingen](/wiki/T%C3%BCbingen "Tübingen")/[Reutlingen](/wiki/Reutlingen "Reutlingen"). These cities are arranged into three [agglomeration](/wiki/Urban_agglomeration "Urban agglomeration") areas. The [population](/wiki/Population "Population") of the area is about 5,300,000 and it is one of the biggest regions in Germany.

["Bruttoinlandsprodukt (BIP) in den Metropolregionen\* in Deutschland im Jahr 2021"](https://de.statista.com/statistik/daten/studie/603802/umfrage/bruttoinlandsprodukt-in-den-metropolregionen-in-deutschland/) (in German).

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Place in Baden-Württemberg, Germany

| Stuttgart Metropolitan Region  *Metropolregion Stuttgart* | |

The **Stuttgart Metropolitan Region** is a [metropolitan region](/wiki/Metropolitan_regions_in_Germany "Metropolitan regions in Germany") in south-west [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany") consisting of the [cities](/wiki/City "City") and regions around [Stuttgart](/wiki/Stuttgart "Stuttgart"), [Heilbronn](/wiki/Heilbronn "Heilbronn"), [Tübingen](/wiki/T%C3%BCbingen "Tübingen")/[Reutlingen](/wiki/Reutlingen "Reutlingen"). These cities are arranged into three [agglomeration](/wiki/Urban_agglomeration "Urban agglomeration") areas. The [population](/wiki/Population "Population") of the area is about 5,300,000 and it is one of the biggest regions in Germany.
This area covers an area of ca 15,000 km2.

The Stuttgart metropolitan region is roughly 200 km south of [Frankfurt](/wiki/Frankfurt "Frankfurt"), 200 km west of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich") and about 600 km east of [Paris](/wiki/Paris "Paris").
Other metropolitan areas around are [Rhine-Neckar](/wiki/Rhine-Neckar "Rhine-Neckar"), [Frankfurt Rhine-Main](/wiki/Frankfurt_Rhine-Main "Frankfurt Rhine-Main"), [Nuremberg Metropolitan](/wiki/Nuremberg_Metropolitan_Region "Nuremberg Metropolitan Region") and [Munich Metropolitan](/wiki/Munich_Metropolitan_Region "Munich Metropolitan Region").

The region is one of the economically strongest regions in Germany and [Europe](/wiki/Europe "Europe").
Many well-known companies like [Mercedes-Benz](/wiki/Mercedes-Benz_Group "Mercedes-Benz Group"), [Porsche](/wiki/Porsche "Porsche"), [Bosch](/wiki/Robert_Bosch_GmbH "Robert Bosch GmbH"), [Mahle](/wiki/Mahle_GmbH "Mahle GmbH"), [Lidl](/wiki/Lidl "Lidl"), [Kaufland](/wiki/Kaufland "Kaufland"), [Würth](/wiki/W%C3%BCrth "Würth"), [Märklin](/wiki/M%C3%A4rklin "Märklin"), [Stihl](/wiki/Stihl "Stihl"), [Kärcher](/wiki/K%C3%A4rcher "Kärcher"), [Trumpf](/wiki/Trumpf "Trumpf") and [Festo](/wiki/Festo "Festo") have their worldwide headquarters in the region.
Furthermore many small and medium-size [hidden champions](/wiki/Hidden_champions "Hidden champions") are located in the region, forming the German [Mittelstand](/wiki/Mittelstand "Mittelstand").
International companies like [IBM](/wiki/IBM "IBM"), [Hewlett-Packard](/wiki/Hewlett-Packard "Hewlett-Packard"), [Intersport](/wiki/Intersport "Intersport"), [Euronics](/wiki/Euronics "Euronics") and [FrieslandCampina](/wiki/FrieslandCampina "FrieslandCampina") have their German headquarters in the region as well.

Culturally the region is mostly [Swabian](/wiki/Swabia "Swabia"), with some [Franconian](/wiki/Franconia "Franconia") parts in the north.
The region has a strong [wine](/wiki/Wine "Wine") and [beer](/wiki/Beer "Beer") tradition with many wine and beer festivals round the year. Most notably are the [Cannstatter Volksfest](/wiki/Cannstatter_Volksfest "Cannstatter Volksfest") (an [Oktoberfest](/wiki/Oktoberfest "Oktoberfest")-like celebration that occurs twice a year), the Stuttgart wine festival and the Heilbronn wine festival.
Typical dishes of the region are [Maultaschen](/wiki/Maultasche "Maultasche"), [Spätzle](/wiki/Sp%C3%A4tzle "Spätzle") (e.g. as [Linsen mit Spätzle](/wiki/Linsen_mit_Sp%C3%A4tzle "Linsen mit Spätzle")), [Flädle](/wiki/Fl%C3%A4dle "Flädle") soup, [Schupfnudeln](/wiki/Schupfnudel "Schupfnudel") and Zwiebelrostbraten.
